pattern.imageEvidence: sharpening bench with knives, water tray, and route bins
pattern.styleContract: Steady craft confidence with edge-care proof, real sharpening bench evidence, stainless blue-gray surfaces, graphite ink, tomato action accents, and a route-day bench ticket as the signature move.

tagline: Sharper kitchen tools, no drawer guilt required.

hero.title: EdgeRoute mobile knife sharpening hero image
hero.alt: A mobile knife sharpening specialist honing a kitchen knife at an outdoor bench with a safe tool layout, water tray, and route-day bins nearby.

contact.serviceArea: Mobile sharpening for chef knives, paring knives, serrated checks, kitchen shears, garden snips, route-day bundle pickups, and careful edge-care notes for home cooks, small kitchens, and neighborhood pickup stops

copy.eyebrow: Mobile sharpening with a careful bench setup
copy.heroText: EdgeRoute brings a tidy bench to route stops, refreshes hardworking kitchen edges, and sends every blade home with simple care notes.
copy.introTitle: Kitchen edges, garden snips, and the scissors everyone hides.
copy.introText: We sort by blade type, condition, serration, handle safety, and how each tool is actually used before deciding the sharpening path.
copy.quoteTitle: Ready for the next sharpening route?
copy.quoteText: Join the route with quick count, a few photos, your neighborhood, and any problem blades. We will reply with route timing, bundle advice, and what should skip the bench.

services.title: Kitchen Knife Refresh
services.text: Chef, santoku, paring, and utility knives sharpened carefully with edge checks, wipe-down, and care notes for home kitchens.

services.title: Shears And Snips Check
services.text: Kitchen shears, light garden snips, and utility scissors reviewed for safe sharpening, cleaning needs, and hinge condition.

services.title: Route Bundle Pass
services.text: A small household bundle sorted, sharpened, and packed with notes so the drawer stops collecting dull regrets.

process.title: Count the tools
process.text: You send photos and a rough count; we flag serrated, damaged, or unsafe blades before route day.

process.title: Sharpen at the bench
process.text: Each edge gets the right pass, water control, wipe-down, and a safe staging spot before it goes back in the roll.

process.title: Send care notes
process.text: You get a simple note about storage, boards, honing, and which tool may need repair instead of more sharpening.

proof.label: plain advice to keep the edge longer

serviceDetails.turnaround: Edge check: each blade inspected before handoff.
serviceDetails.whatToSend: Send your address or neighborhood, access notes, preferred cadence, photos when useful, and any skip conditions before joining the route.
serviceDetails.prepNote: You send photos and a rough count; we flag serrated, damaged, or unsafe blades before route day.
serviceDetails.serviceRhythm: Route-fit flow for Mobile sharpening for chef knives, paring knives, serrated checks, kitchen shears, garden snips, route-day bundle pickups, and careful edge-care notes for home cooks, small kitchens, and neighborhood pickup stops: cadence, access, skip rules, and first-visit notes make the route realistic.
serviceDetails.objectionAnswer: For mobile knife sharpening service, item count, blade condition, pickup access, and what should skip the bench are confirmed before the route stop is booked.
